positive: A majestic, stylized woodland creature, a fox with ethereal, glowing cyan fur accents, sitting gracefully in a mossy, enchanted forest clearing. The composition should be centered, emphasizing the fox's beautiful silhouette and alert pose. Use high contrast, complementary bioluminescent cyan and deep forest greens, with hints of cosmic purple in the background mist. The art style should be a blend of ornate Art Nouveau illustration and modern vector graphic clarity, suitable for a screen print on apparel. Cinematic rim lighting highlighting the fur contours. Highly detailed, clean lines, perfect symmetry, digital painting, minimal background clutter.
negative: blur, low resolution, noisy, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, mutated, bad anatomy, artifacts, fuzzy, bokeh, gradient, messy background, noise, overexposed
